name: Rum Eggnog Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-cup glass measure, blend the eggnog and cornstarch until smooth.
2. Microwave uncovered at high for 4 - 5 minutes, until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens, stirring twice. Cover and let cool slightly; refrigerate until cold.
3. In a bowl, beat whipping cream until soft peaks form; beat in rum or brandy. Fold into eggnog mixture until smooth. Refrigerate sauce until ready to serve.
4. Makes about 2 cups.
From The Gazette 90/12/19.
